Comment: Lambda 2 (Worker) execution role — full IAM remediation permissions, least privilege

Statement._comment: Worker performs ALL IAM actions through credentials returned by this STS AssumeRole. The cross-account role (cross_account_remediation_role.json) carries the enumerated IAM write allow-list plus the defense-in-depth iam:* Deny on root, break-glass-*, emergency-*, and :role/*. No direct iam:* grant on this role is needed; the prior IAMRemediationActions_WILDCARD_OK block was redundant and has been removed for least privilege.

WILDCARD_OK: Deny on iam:* for Resource:* is defense in depth. Even if a future edit reintroduces a direct IAM grant on this role, this Deny forces the caller back through the cross-account path where the protected-principal deny list lives.
